title: Reset generated demo3 progress sliders to zero
summary: 0.6.38 keeps generated demo3 scrub sliders from inheriting stale authored trigger values, so the slider starts at zero until live readback is wired.
changes: The demo3 builder now forces generated progress sliders to default to zero instead of preserving any saved Trigger.value from the template.
Generated volume sliders still preserve their intended default of one.
reasoning: The generated demo3 scene was carrying a stale progress trigger value of 0.7334521 into all three scrub sliders.
Because live scene-slider readback is not wired yet, that stale default could fight scrubbing and make the experience feel janky.
This is a builder-only correction and does not need a new runtime policy.
operatorVisibleOutcomes: Fresh demo3 scenes should now open with progress sliders at the beginning instead of starting mid-track.
Scrubbing should no longer be influenced by a stale saved slider default before live readback exists.
knownIssues: This slice does not yet add live slider readback for demo3.
This slice does not change text displays, side-screen placement, or playback logic.
